name: zutil_zrdr_set_search_path
description: zUtil_ZRDR_SetSearchPath creates the global search-path list on first use and replaces its payloads on later calls.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare passed with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 24 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 51 bytes and the VC object body is 64 bytes with 13 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The native smoke verifies first-use global list creation and replacement of existing search-path payloads.
